name: Phathom Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
business: We are a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on commercializing and developing novel treatments for gastrointestinal, or GI, diseases. Our approved products, VOQUEZNA, VOQUEZNA DUAL PAK and VOQUEZNA TRIPLE PAK, contain vonoprazan, an oral small molecule potassium-competitive acid blocker, or PCAB.

exposures.sentence: We are a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on commercializing and developing novel treatments for gastrointestinal, or GI, diseases.

catalysts.event: Initiated Phase 2 clinical trial for eosinophilic esophagitis
catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, we initiated a Phase 2 clinical trial evaluating vonoprazan in the treatment of adults with eosinophilic esophagitis, or EoE.

On January 9, 2026, we sold 6,875,000 shares of our common stock at a price of $16.00 per share and pre-funded warrants to purchase 1,250,078 shares of our common stock at a price of $15.999 per pre-funded warrant for total gross proceeds of $130.0 million.
...we anticipate achieving operating profitability beginning in the third quarter of 2026, excluding stock-based compensation.

catalysts.event: Entered into Fifth Loan Amendment with Hercules
catalysts.sentence: On February 25, 2026, we entered into the Fifth Amendment to the Loan and Security Agreement, or the Fifth Loan Amendment, with the lenders...
